text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer. Do you ever think about how
wonderful hospital food is?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's low in sodium, calories, and it's easy to digest. And they do all this while trying to affect the flavor as little as possible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame that we can only eat such food while
in the hospital. There's so much we could learn
from it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking, I'd like to organize a hospital
food party for some of my closest friends. Would
you like to join?
